Appearances: Marcus Dong of Kaufman Dolowich & Voluck, LLP telephone number 415-926-7634 for Cross-Complainants Lawrence Stephens and Pamela Stephens.
Donald Edgar of Smith Dollar PC telephone number 707-522-1100 for Cross-Defendant Nickesh Shah M.D.

Mr. Dong informed that the Court that he submitted a first amended cross-complaint for electronic filing yesterday. The Court vacated its tentative ruling. CROSS-DEFENDANT NICKESH SHAH, M.D.'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT is off calendar. A first amended cross-complaint has or will be filed.
